sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n70008" key="nebroxi/twn" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">νεβρο-χίτων</orth> <pron extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="pron">[ῐ]</pron>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, gen. <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ωνος</itype>, <sense id="n70008.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">clad in a</tr_> <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">νεβρίς,</foreign> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Simm.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">15</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
